name: Jewish Girls School - Taltala

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I recently had the privilege of visiting Jewish Girls school, and I must say that I was thoroughly impressed with the school's facilities, staff, and overall environment. The school had a cheerful and welcoming atmosphere, with bright and spacious classrooms that were well-equipped with modern technology.

The school had a diverse range of extracurricular activities that catered to the interests of all students. The sports facilities were impressive, with a well-maintained track, a basketball court, and a swimming pool. The school also had a well-stocked library that provided students with a wide range of reading materials.

What stood out to me the most was the dedication of the school staff towards the education and well-being of their students. The teachers were highly qualified, passionate about their work, and provided personalized attention to each student. They encouraged students to think critically, ask questions, and participate actively in class.

The school also placed a strong emphasis on character development and instilling values such as honesty, integrity, and respect. The students were well-behaved, polite, and confident, which is a testament to the school's holistic approach towards education.

Overall, I was thoroughly impressed with Jewish Girls school. The school provides an excellent education that is both academically rigorous and inclusive. The facilities and staff are top-notch, and the school's culture fosters a love of learning, personal growth, and community engagement. I would highly recommend this school to anyone looking for a nurturing and empowering environment for their daughter's education.

My cousin studies here and It's the worst school ever. The new principal is making it more. She humiliated the students because their parents could not pay  their child fees on time that even in front of everyone, (should'nt the principal be understanding enough?) shouts at parents because they send their child to coaching for extra help (now what can one do if the schools education system is degrading) . One of the biggest reason for the downfall of this institute. Will never ever recommend it to anyone.

It's a very good school with good manners... But all the computer chapters are very lengthy...(of all Classes) And there should be AC in most of the classes because its very hot out there or else it's a very good school 😊

I am a student of this school  and I love 💕 to study here . The most important thing is that everyone is like your family here 😊 studying here is like a second home to me . Everytime something is happening , carnival , sports , concert and many more. Enjoying with friends ,teachers are fun .😘❤️❤️

An oasis of communal harmony when peace among different faith is at a premium. I don't think any school going Jew girl is there in Kolkata now. Thus this school located in a predominantly Muslim locality it gives an option to Muslim girls an opportunity to get a good education. Hebrew is no longer taught here, but all Jewish holidays are observed. Excellent school but recent increase in fees etc has created a lot of tension. Hopefully problems would be sorted out soon.
